description: Perform an infrastructure equity analysis to identify zones with the highest concentration of EV 'charging-vulnerable' households using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/ev_charging_analysis.ipynb. Using the households, buildings, and parcels data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5, identify households that own at least one vehicle and reside in multi-family buildings (>= 5 residential units). For zones with a minimum of 100 households, calculate the total households, number of vulnerable households, and the percentage of vulnerability. Export the top 20 zones ranked by percentage in descending order to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/ev_charging_priority_zones.csv with columns zone_id, total_households, vuln_households, and vuln_pct. Save a scatter plot of total versus vulnerable households for the filtered zones to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/ev_vulnerability_scatter.png. Ensure all cells in the notebook are executed.
